kids.title: Don't let them fall behind. Give your child the confidence to lead.
kids.description: Interactive, small-batch live classes in public speaking, chess, logic, and music designed to build focus, speaking posture, and real-world confidence.
kids.studentBubble: Look! I solved the 3x3 Rubik's cube under 45 seconds!
kids.tutorBubble: Incredible, Aarav! Your spatial memory has doubled! 🚀

adults.title: Don't just learn. Master real skills with live experts.
adults.description: Stop wasting hours on passive, pre-recorded lectures. Master corporate communication, active persuasion, and logical reasoning under live mentoring with peers.
adults.studentBubble: How do I command attention in our team meetings?
adults.tutorBubble: Slow down your pacing by 10% and pause before key takeaways, Nisha.

pasGrid.title: The Skillbag Difference: \nWhy our students actually succeed.
pasGrid.description: Learning a real skill requires feedback, correction, and encouragement. Passive videos don't talk back — Skillbag does.

pillars.problemDesc: Watching pre-recorded video modules feels like a chore. There is no urgency to complete them, leading to a 95% dropout rate.
pillars.solutionDesc: Active, two-way discussions. Learn by doing, ask questions on the fly, and receive immediate coaching inside every class.

pillars.problemDesc: Large webinars with 100+ students leave no room for personal feedback. You're left to figure out mistakes on your own.
pillars.solutionDesc: Intimate class sizing ensuring our certified mentors can focus on your specific strengths, weaknesses, and speaking posture.

pillars.problemDesc: Many platforms hire unvetted freelancers with little teaching experience. Quality varies wildly, frustrating students.
pillars.solutionDesc: Every Skillbag instructor undergoes rigorous pedagogy vetting, background checks, and active communication checks.

courses.title: Skillbag Rubik's Cube Course
courses.description: Learn spatial pattern recognition, analytical finger tricks, and speed-solving algorithms in an engaging, interactive live online class environment.
courses.format: Live online classes + interactive practice drills
outcomes: Solve the 3x3 cube confidently from scratch
Master standard core layer algorithms
Improve mental focus and calculation speed

Structure thoughts systematically for short talks

testimonials.name: Naina
testimonials.quote: I used to freeze and look down whenever I had to speak in public. Skillbag's live speech drills gave me a safe, small-group space to practice. Last week, I won my first school-level debate competition!

testimonials.name: Aarav's Dad
testimonials.transformation: Shy kid to active class participant
testimonials.quote: My son struggled with focus and would easily give up on math questions. The maximum 8 students limit meant the coach engaged him constantly. Now he loves solving abacus drills live!

testimonials.name: Rohan
testimonials.quote: I was extremely anxious about presenting to client leads in the US. The instructor analyzed my vocal pacing, helped me eliminate fillers, and gave me practical exercises to speak with command.

testimonials.name: Mira's Mom
testimonials.transformation: Plays favorite songs confidently at home
testimonials.quote: Mira had zero music experience and would private-practice in her room out of embarrassment. The friendly peer showcases built her confidence. Now she comfortably plays chord sequences for us!

testimonials.name: Kunal's Father
testimonials.transformation: Channeled screen time into critical logic ♟️
testimonials.quote: We wanted to reduce Kunal's passive iPad watching. The live chess coach redirected his screen time into analyzing board tactics and planning moves. His focus has improved in school too.

testimonials.name: Divya
testimonials.quote: I had strong academic marks but failed at dynamic group discussions. The coaching structured my answers using frameworks that sound natural yet professional. It got me hired in the final round!

faqs.question: Do you offer live classes only?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single Skillbag class is 100% live and interactive. We do not sell pre-recorded video lectures. Our students learn in real-time, face-to-face with the coach in structured virtual classrooms.

faqs.question: What is the schedule and batch frequency?
faqs.answer: Classes are held twice a week. We offer flexible batch timings (afternoons, evenings, and weekends) to fit school and work schedules. If you miss a class, we provide a coordinate catch-up session.

faqs.question: How do I book a trial and what is the pricing?
faqs.answer: Booking a trial is zero-friction. Click the 'Connect on WhatsApp' button and our admissions coordinator will instantly share batch schedules, clarify pricing tiers, and book your free trial slot.

faqs.question: What is your batch size capacity?
faqs.answer: To ensure high-trust guidance and custom speaking feedback, we cap our batch sizes at 8 students maximum. This allows the tutor to call on every student and track individual progress.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you decide to withdraw from the course within the first 2 sessions of starting the batch, we will issue a full refund, no questions asked.
